prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger** (82mm compressor wheel, 62mm turbine) paired with a **custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe** (APR or IBR Fabrications) to support the **DAZA 2.0L TFSI (EA888 Gen 3)** engine's 500+ HP potential on **100-octane fuel** with a **Motec M150 ECU** for full flex-fuel and boost-by-gear mapping.

Install **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 CR)** with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** and **ARP L19 head studs** to handle 35+ psi of boost, paired with a **Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential (40% lockup)** and **Wavetrac helical gear LSD** for the front axle to eliminate torque steer under extreme acceleration.

Replace the OEM **DQ500 7-speed S tronic** transmission with a **standalone Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox** (dog-ring engagement, 6-speed, 1,000 Nm torque capacity) and a **Penske 8760 triple-adjustable coilover kit** (24-position rebound, 18-position compression) with **Eibach ERS springs (1,200 lb/in front, 1,000 lb/in rear)** for track-specific alignment (-3.5° front camber, -2.8° rear camber).
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, 50mm extended flares) with **custom 3D-printed ABS splitters** (Audi Sport homologated design) and **APR GT300 rear diffuser** (CFRP, 3-stage Gurney flaps) for 1,200 lbs of downforce at 180 mph.

Install **OMP Carbon Kevlar racing seats (HANS-compatible, FIA 8862-2009 certified)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2 type)** and a **MOMO Prototipo EVO steering wheel** (quick-release, 320mm diameter) wrapped in **Alcantara with carbon fiber shift paddles (extended for sequential gearbox use)**.

Apply a **full PPF (XPEL Stealth) wrap** with **3M Scotchlite reflective decals (custom RS3 LMS TCR livery)** and **Hella Pagid RS48 brake pads** paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (400mm front rotors, 380mm rear)** painted in **Gloss Ferrari Rosso Corsa** with **gold titanium nitride-coated pistons** for heat dissipation.
